era_context: Early Bronze Age III; same period as -3174, -3173, and -3172. Monumental construction is underway in Egypt and Mesopotamia. The Indus Valley is in its early settlement phase. Writing systems are developing but not yet standardized for historical record-keeping.
disconfirming_evidence: No events documented. No disconfirming evidence applies.
historiographic_note: Same as previous years. This year is beyond the reach of historical documentation.
